news.title: 卫星图像揭示伊朗学校遭多次袭击
news.title0: Iran school and nearby military base struck multiple times, satellite image reveals
news.content: 卫星图像分析显示，伊朗南部一所学校周围遭多次袭击，造成168人死亡。美以均未承认责任。
news.content0: Warning: this story contains details which some readers might find distressing
news.author: BBC

news.title: 布兰妮·斯皮尔斯因酒驾嫌疑被捕
news.title0: Britney Spears arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence
news.content: 美国流行歌手布兰妮·斯皮尔斯在加州因涉嫌酒后驾车被捕，现已获释，将于5月出庭。
news.content0: Britney Spears has been arrested in California under suspicion of driving under the influence.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 特朗普白宫舞厅计划投票因批评推迟
news.title0: 'Gaudy' - Vote on Trump's White House ballroom postponed amid deluge of criticism
news.content: 特朗普提议的白宫大型舞厅建设计划投票因收到超3.2万份反对意见而推迟至4月2日。
news.content0: A vote on President Donald Trump's proposed White House ballroom has been postponed after a commission overseeing changes received more than 32,000 comments, mostly in opposition, from the public.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 特朗普提名MMA出身的参议员任国土安全部长
news.title0: Who is Markwayne Mullin, Trump's new pick for Homeland Security secretary?
news.content: 特朗普提名俄克拉荷马州参议员、前综合格斗选手马克韦恩·马林接替克里斯蒂·诺姆出任国土安全部长。
news.content0: US President Donald Trump has announced Oklahoma Senator Markwayne Mullin will be the new Homeland Security secretary, replacing the agency's embattled head Kristi Noem.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 厄瓜多尔军方查获35米长“毒品潜艇”
news.title0: Ecuadorean troops find 35m-long 'narco-sub' hidden in nature reserve
news.content: 厄瓜多尔军方在靠近哥伦比亚边境的自然保护区查获一艘35米长、载有大量燃料的“毒品潜艇”。
news.content0: The Ecuadorean military says it has seized a 35m-long (115ft) "narco submarine" hidden in a nature reserve near the country's border with Colombia.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国请求乌克兰协助防御伊朗无人机
news.title0: US asked Ukraine for help fighting Iranian drones, Zelensky says
news.content: 泽连斯基称，美国已请求乌克兰协助海湾盟友防御伊朗无人机袭击，乌方愿有条件提供支持。
news.content0: The US has asked Ukraine for help defending Gulf allies against Iranian drones, according to President Volodymyr Zelensky.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 得州酒吧枪击案嫌犯被击毙，或涉恐怖主义
news.title0: Police release 'difficult to see' bodycam footage of Austin bar shooting
news.content: 美国得州奥斯汀酒吧枪击案致3死16伤，嫌犯被警方击毙，FBI正调查其是否涉恐怖主义。
news.content0: Police have released video footage and recordings of 911 emergency calls from the hours surrounding the moment a gunman opened fire outside a bar in Austin, Texas - an attack being investigated as a potential act of  "terrorism".
news.author: BBC

news.title: 苹果发布史上最便宜新款MacBook
news.title0: Apple announces its cheapest-ever new MacBook
news.content: 苹果发布起售价599美元的MacBook Neo，首次在笔记本中使用iPhone芯片，旨在吸引新用户。
news.content0: Apple on Wednesday launched the MacBook Neo, the company’s cheapest-ever new model.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 葡萄牙文学巨匠安东尼奥·洛博·安图内斯逝世
news.title0: António Lobo Antunes, One of Europe’s Most Revered Writers, Dies at 83
news.content: 葡萄牙著名作家安东尼奥·洛博·安图内斯在里斯本逝世，享年83岁，其作品深刻剖析了葡萄牙社会。
news.content0: António Lobo Antunes, a prolific Portuguese novelist whose multilayered narratives dissecting the faultlines of Portuguese society made him a literary giant in his native country and further afield, died on Thursday in Lisbon. He was 83.
news.author: NYTimes
